score_1_definition: Mostly company narrative, media, or market chatter
score_3_definition: Mix of company filings, institutional sources and third-party data
score_5_definition: Primary filings, independent data, peer evidence, customer/channel evidence and contrary sources

score_3_definition: Most lenses populated but one or more important source gaps remain
score_5_definition: All material lenses populated and immaterial lenses explicitly waived

score_3_definition: Some conflicts identified but not ranked
score_5_definition: Key conflicts ranked by thesis materiality and evidence quality

score_1_definition: Valuation mentioned but not linked to operating assumptions
score_3_definition: Rough market-implied expectations or scenario ranges
score_5_definition: Explicit implied expectations, anchor quality, downside path and false-precision warning
Refresh triggers are observable, dated, and tied to thesis state changes

score_3_definition: Workflow changes source-gap map or confidence
score_5_definition: Workflow changes conclusion, sizing/actionability, or kill criteria

score_3_definition: Usable for standard research with some trimming
score_5_definition: Clear quick/standard/deep modes and no redundant fields
Clear enough for another analyst to reproduce and challenge
